Bash(cd "F:/1work/农业能源环境/server" && node --input-type=module << 'EOF'
import db from './src/database.js'

console.log\('=== Checking crop_records table ==='\)
const records = db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM crop_records ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5'\).all\(\)
console.log\('Total records:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM crop_records'\).get\(\).count\)
console.log\('Recent records:', JSON.stringify\(records, null, 2\)\)

console.log\('\\n=== Checking crop_images table ==='\)
const images = db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM crop_images ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5'\).all\(\)
console.log\('Total images:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM crop_images'\).get\(\).count\)
console.log\('Recent images:', JSON.stringify\(images, null, 2\)\)
EOF)
